citations.quote: Edinburgh Napier University - Payment Confirmation (Ref: ENU447436) ... Paid today: 30.00 (GBP)

findings.text: Source NAP-SRC-0007 is a payment confirmation from Edinburgh Napier University showing a £30.00 payment with reference ENU447436.
No Azure Document Intelligence tool is configured in the available tools. The worker cannot configure external cloud services. Human/tool setup is required.
Existing Tesseract OCR extraction has low confidence (0.65) and garbled output, risking unreliable data for downstream tasks.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Feasibility Note for TASK-003-FOLLOWUP

**Task:** Configure Azure Document Intelligence for re-extraction of NAP-SRC-0007

**Status:** Cannot be completed by this worker.

**Reason:** The available tools do not include Azure Document Intelligence or any cloud OCR configuration tool. The worker is limited to the tools listed in the context pack (e.g., SearchLegalMemory, InspectRecord, BuildContextPack, ValidateCitation, ListMatterArtifacts, ListMatterSources, ExplainValidationGate, ReadDraftArtifact, RecordCandidate, ReduceCandidate, RejectCandidate, WriteDraftArtifact, EditDraftArtifact, MarkMemoryStale, CreateProposedTask). None of these tools can configure an external cloud service.

**Recommendation:** A human operator or a separate tooling task should:
1. Provision Azure Document Intelligence (or an equivalent service) in the Atticus harness environment.
2. Register the tool in the available_tools registry.
3. Re-extract NAP-SRC-0007 using the new OCR engine.
4. Validate the output against the original JPEG source.

**Validation gates:** production_mapping, chain_of_custody must be satisfied before the re-extracted text is trusted.
proposed_artifacts.title: Feasibility Note: Azure Document Intelligence Not Available

proposed_tasks.instructions: Provision Azure Document Intelligence (or equivalent cloud OCR service) in the Atticus harness environment. Register the tool in the available_tools registry. Then re-extract source NAP-SRC-0007 using the new OCR engine. Validate the output against the original JPEG source. Ensure production_mapping and chain_of_custody validation gates are satisfied.
proposed_tasks.title: Provision and configure Azure Document Intelligence for OCR re-extraction

risk_flags.description: Low-confidence OCR extraction may introduce errors in payment amount, reference, or student number.

summary: Task is to configure Azure Document Intelligence for re-extraction of source NAP-SRC-0007. The existing Tesseract OCR extraction (art-extracted-NAP-SRC-0007) has low confidence (0.65) and garbled output. No Azure Document Intelligence tool is configured in the available tools. The worker cannot configure external cloud services. A drafting note flags the feasibility gap. A proposed task requests human/tool setup to configure Azure Document Intelligence and re-extract the source.

uncertainties.reason: Azure Document Intelligence is not available in the tool registry; configuration cannot be performed by this worker.
